section.title: intent
section.programlisting: <unit id="1"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agent="gpt-5.5" appliesTo="target" intent="This version sounds slightly smoother and more idiomatic: 'para descargar' is often preferred over 'para descarga' in everyday usage."/> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos xa está dispoñible para descargar.</target> </segment> </unit>
